Author: Josh
UsageNotes:
When you want to ensure the MasterItems are putaway/move in specific or allocated Locations.
This process will validate whether based on the MasterItem and the Location Type.
ImplementationNotes: The logic is based on the EnforceTypeMatchInLocations property on MasterItem. Make sure to set this to enforce the behavior.
Name: LOCATION_TYPE_PUTAWAY
Description:
PUTAWAY

When you want to ensure the MasterItems are putaway/move in specific or allocated Locations.
This process will validate whether based on the MasterItem and the Location Type.

The logic is based on the EnforceTypeMatchInLocations property on MasterItem. Make sure to set this to enforce the behavior.
